title: Mary And John.
content:
If John marries Mary, and Mary alone,
    �Tis a very good match between Mary and John.
    Should John wed a score, oh, the claws and the scratches!
    It can�t be a match��tis a bundle of matches.
meaning:
William Cowper's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Mary And John."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
